name: Creating A/B Campaigns
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can use A/B campaigns to systematically improve your email marketing performance by testing different elements of your campaigns before sending to your full audience. This approach helps optimize campaign effectiveness by identifying which subject lines, content, or sender names typically perform better with your specific audience, leading to measurable improvements in engagement metrics like open rates and click-through rates."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "A/B testing enables data-driven decision-making in your email marketing strategy, allowing you to make informed choices about campaign elements rather than relying on assumptions. When properly configured, this testing methodology helps maximize email marketing ROI by ensuring you send the most effective version of your campaign to the majority of your subscribers."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "An "}, {"text": "A/B campaign", "bold": true}, {"text": " (also known as a "}, {"text": "split test campaign", "bold": true}, {"text": ") is a method used to test which campaign your contacts are the most receptive to or most\u00a0engaged with."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In other words, it\u2019s a way to test which campaign is the most effective to increase the engagement of your contacts, in terms of opens, clicks, or purchases.\u00a0You can choose what you want to test (content, subject, or from name) and compare the results, as even marginal improvements in drop-off rates can represent a significant gain in sales."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Creating an A/B Campaign", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Perform the following steps to\u00a0create a new A/B campaign:"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "1. In Navigation, go to "}, {"text": "CAMPAIGNS", "bold": true}, {"text": " and select "}, {"text": "Email Campaigns", "bold": true}, {"text": ". On the "}, {"text": "Email Campaigns", "bold": true}, {"text": " page, click\u00a0"}, {"text": "NEW CAMPAIGN", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/ABCampaignNav.05T5g00000bCUI2EAO.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/ABCampaignNav.05T5g00000bCUI2EAO.png", "name": "User-added image", "embedType": "image", "float": "none", "height": 525, "width": 700}}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "2. On the "}, {"text": "Create New Campaign", "bold": true}, {"text": " page, click "}, {"text": "A/B Email Campaign", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/NewCampaignSelectType.05T5g00000bCUIgEAO.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/NewCampaignSelectType.05T5g00000bCUIgEAO.png", "name": "User-added image", "embedType": "image", "float": "none", "height": 525, "width": 700}}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "3. On the "}, {"text": "New A/B Campaign", "bold": true}, {"text": " page, in step 1, provide\u00a0the A/B campaign details."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/ABCampaignStep1.05T5g00000bCUMOEA4.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/ABCampaignStep1.05T5g00000bCUMOEA4.jpg", "name": "User-added image", "embedType": "image", "float": "none", "height": 525, "width": 700}}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In the "}, {"text": "Campaign Information", "bold": true}, {"text": " section, enter the\u00a0name of the campaign. Then, enter the\u00a0\"from email\" and \"reply to\" email addresses"}, {"text": ".", "italic": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In the "}, {"text": "Contacts", "bold": true}, {"text": " section,\u00a0select the target group(s) from the given options: lists, segments, suppress lists, suppress segments, and suppress workflows"}, {"text": ".", "italic": true}, {"text": " You may also select a campaign tag to associate with your campaign."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "The "}, {"text": "Address", "bold": true}, {"text": " and "}, {"text": "Language", "bold": true}, {"text": " fields are pre-populated based on the value entered\u00a0on the Account & Billing page, which you may change for the campaign."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Enable the \""}, {"text": "Show email preview link", "bold": true}, {"text": "\" toggle to attach\u00a0an option for email preview.\u00a0When the toggle is enabled, the text \"If you are having trouble viewing this email, click here\u201d is automatically inserted at the top of your campaign."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "4. Click "}, {"text": "NEXT", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "5. In Step 2 of the "}, {"text": "New A/B Campaign", "bold": true}, {"text": " page, select the winning criteria\u00a0for\u00a0A/B testing."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/ABCampaignStep2.05T5g00000e4CRMEA2.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/ABCampaignStep2.05T5g00000e4CRMEA2.png", "name": "User-added image", "embedType": "image", "float": "none", "height": 525, "width": 700}}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": " The following options are available:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Top Choices: ", "bold": true}, {"text": "The campaign sent to the final group combines the subject line and from name from the test group having the highest open rate, together with the content from the test group having the highest click rate."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Highest Open Rate: ", "bold": true}, {"text": "Everything from the email sent to the test group having the highest open rate is replicated and sent to the final group."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Highest Click Rate:\u00a0", "bold": true}, {"text": "Everything from the email sent to the test group having the highest click rate is replicated and sent to the final group."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Manual Selection:\u00a0", "bold": true}, {"text": "Enables you to select everything after viewing the reports for the final campaign."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Highest Click-to-Open Rate", "bold": true}, {"text": ":\u00a0Everything from the email sent to the test group having the highest click-to-open rate is replicated and sent to the final group."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Highest Conversion Rate", "bold": true}, {"text": ": Everything from the email sent to the test group having the highest conversion rate is replicated and sent to the final group."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "6. Enter the split group information for the A/B test. You\u00a0must"}, {"text": "\u00a0", "italic": true}, {"text": "fill in\u00a0all\u00a0fields for split groups.\u00a0Two or more groups are required for an A/B split test to be sent. You can select different content, subjects, 'from names,' pre-headers, and 'send at' times for all different groups. Allocate a percentage to each group;\u00a0the sum of percentage allocations should not exceed 100%.\u00a0"}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Note:", "bold": true}, {"text": " The percentage you don\u2019t allocate to split groups will be automatically allocated to the final group (for example, if you only send to 70% of the lists, the remaining 30% will be sent to the final group). If the allocated percentages\u00a0add up to 100%, there will be no emails sent to the final group based on the winning criteria. You can also set a schedule for when the final campaign will be sent. "}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Duplicating Test Groups:", "bold": true}, {"text": " If you want to send your A/B campaign to more than two\u00a0test groups, you can simply duplicate the split groups and enter different values for the new ones.\u00a0To create\u00a0duplicate split groups, select\u00a0the\u00a0test groups and then\u00a0click the Duplicate\u00a0icon in the top right corner."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"bold": true, "text": "Note:"}, {"text": " The Duplicate and Delete icons for the split groups are disabled until a split group is selected. You can select multiple split groups to duplicate or delete in bulk."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": "", "bold": true}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/SplitGroups.05T5g00000cTYRpEAO.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/SplitGroups.05T5g00000cTYRpEAO.png", "name": "User-added image", "embedType": "image", "float": "none", "height": 525, "width": 700}}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "7. Optionally, you can send a test email for the campaign. Enter up to 30 recipients for the test email and click Send Test."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/SendTest.05T5g00000cTlqOEAS.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/SendTest.05T5g00000cTlqOEAS.png", "name": "User-added image", "embedType": "image", "float": "none", "height": 525, "width": 700}}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Note: ", "bold": true}, {"text": "The test email recipients do not have to be from the same contact lists that you have selected for the campaign. You can select up to 20 contacts in the form of contact lists and manually enter up to 10 contacts in the form of email addresses. You can select multiple lists for the test email, but the total contacts must be limited to 20."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "8. Optionally, you can\u00a0use the\u00a0"}, {"text": "Pre-Send Calculation", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0toggle button to start calculating the audience three hours prior to sending the campaign. You can use the option to prevent any possible delays in delivering campaigns that contain numerous segments or suppressions."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Note: ", "bold": true}, {"text": "The \""}, {"text": "pre-send calculation", "bold": true}, {"text": "\" option can be used only if you are scheduling the campaign to be sent after at least three hours. If you enable the \""}, {"text": "pre-send calculation", "bold": true}, {"text": "\" toggle and schedule the campaign for under three hours, you will get an error.\n\nOnce the \""}, {"text": "pre-send calculation", "bold": true}, {"text": "\" begins working (three hours before send time), the campaign gets locked, and you can no longer edit the campaign details. However, you can edit the items selected in the campaign. For example, you cannot select different content for the campaign, but you can edit the selected content in the content editor."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "9. Click the\u00a0"}, {"text": "SAVE", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0button to save the campaign as a draft,\u00a0"}, {"text": "SCHEDULE CAMPAIGN", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0to schedule the campaign to be sent, or\u00a0"}, {"text": "SEND NOW", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0to send the campaign regardless of the scheduled send time."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The option for scheduling the campaign is available only if:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "A winning criterion\u00a0other than\u00a0Manual Send is selected. "}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The total size of the test groups is less than 100%."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
